messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The briefing email subject swallows the whole lede — bound and markdown-strip the headline
What it solves: THE DEFECT, CONFIRMED IN CODE. `build-briefing-subject` (briefing_email_lib.bb:46) appends the
briefing's FIRST NON-EMPTY LINE verbatim as the subject headline (BL-099 briefing-03: "subject
names the date and the headline"). That contract silently assumed the briefing opens with a short
headline. T…
How it works: A long lede line is truncated to a bounded, word-boundary headline with an ellipsis

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-392 - The briefing email subject swallows the whole lede — bound and markdown-strip the headline is complete.
